title: Apply online using the IRCC Portal – New version - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply online using the IRCC Portal – New version
We’re testing this new account. You may be able to use it to apply for a visitor visa or super visa.

## The IRCC Portal – New version is in development
We're still developing, improving and expanding what is available in this account.

### Who can use this account
You may be able to use the IRCC Portal – New version if you meet all of the following requirements:
- You’re applying online for a visitor visa or super visa.
- You’re 18 years of age or older.
- You have never applied for anything with us before.
- You’re applying alone.
- You aren’t using a representative (including family or friends applying for you).
- Canadian citizenship
- Permanent resident cards and travel documents
- Canadian passports and travel documents
This online service will be unavailable from 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. Thursday, June 11, 2026, Eastern time , in order to perform system maintenance.

### Planning to attend a FIFA World Cup 2026™ match?
You must use the IRCC Portal to apply for a visitor visa if you’re coming to Canada for a FIFA World Cup 2026™ match either:
- because you’ve been invited by FIFA
The IRCC Portal is a different account than the one available on this page. Do not use the “IRCC Portal – New version”. It won’t work for this application.
Go to the IRCC Portal

## Try the IRCC Portal – New version

### Register : Option 1 of 2

### Sign in : Option 2 of 2
- Sign in to the IRCC Portal – New version

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
